mapper.select: SELECT id, departure_time, arrival_time, duration_minutes, effective_date, flight_number, airline_code, cabin_class, aircraft_type, stops, is_direct, departure_airport, arrival_airport, departure_airport_code, arrival_airport_code, price, original_price, available_seats, status, created_at, updated_at FROM flight WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, departure_time, arrival_time, duration_minutes, effective_date, flight_number, airline_code, cabin_class, aircraft_type, stops, is_direct, departure_airport, arrival_airport, departure_airport_code, arrival_airport_code, price, original_price, available_seats, status, created_at, updated_at FROM flight
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO flight (departure_time, arrival_time, duration_minutes, effective_date, flight_number, airline_code, cabin_class, aircraft_type, stops, is_direct, departure_airport, arrival_airport, departure_airport_code, arrival_airport_code, price, original_price, available_seats, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{departureTime}, #{arrivalTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{effectiveDate}, #{flightNumber}, #{airlineCode}, #{cabinClass}, #{aircraftType}, #{stops}, #{isDirect}, #{departureAirport}, #{arrivalAirport}, #{departureAirportCode}, #{arrivalAirportCode}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{availableSeats}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE flight SET departure_time = #{departureTime}, arrival_time = #{arrivalTime}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, effective_date = #{effectiveDate}, flight_number = #{flightNumber}, airline_code = #{airlineCode}, cabin_class = #{cabinClass}, aircraft_type = #{aircraftType}, stops = #{stops}, is_direct = #{isDirect}, departure_airport = #{departureAirport}, arrival_airport = #{arrivalAirport}, departure_airport_code = #{departureAirportCode}, arrival_airport_code = #{arrivalAirportCode}, price = #{price}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, available_seats = #{availableSeats}, status = #{status}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
